creator: jim@phrantic.phear.net
text:
Addition to handbook page MS-DOS User's Questions and Answers
(http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/handbook19.html).  Change includes what
files are needed to download for an install from an MS-DOS partition.
Written due to the number of questions regarding the matter to the
-questions list.

Fix: 

Addition has been uploaded to
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/dos_install.tar.gz and is also
available at http://www.phear.net/~jim/FreeBSD/dl_for_dos_install.txt
